actions.detail: risk policy in place | legal requirements mapped | context established | system categorized | impacts characterized | validity reliability measured | safety measured | security resilience measured | privacy measured | transparency measured | explainability measured | fairness measured | bias managed | risks prioritized | risk treated | thirdparty risk managed

policies.name: rmf_govern_accountability_assigned
policies.description: Clear roles, responsibilities and lines of accountability for the AI system are established.

policies.name: rmf_govern_legal_requirements_mapped
policies.description: Applicable legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood and managed.

policies.name: rmf_govern_policies_in_place
policies.description: AI risk management policies and processes are in place and applied across the AI lifecycle.

policies.name: rmf_manage_incident_response
policies.description: AI incidents and negative impacts are responded to, recovered from, and communicated.

policies.name: rmf_manage_risk_treated
policies.description: Each identified risk is treated — mitigated, transferred, avoided, or formally accepted.

policies.name: rmf_manage_risks_prioritized
policies.description: AI risks are prioritized and acted upon based on assessment and impact.

policies.name: rmf_manage_thirdparty_risks
policies.description: Risks from third-party AI resources (models, data, services) are identified and managed.

policies.name: rmf_map_context_established
policies.description: The context — intended purpose, setting, and the AI system's role — is established and documented before deployment.

policies.name: rmf_map_impacts_characterized
policies.description: Potential impacts, benefits and risks to individuals, groups, communities and society are mapped.

policies.name: rmf_map_system_categorized
policies.description: The AI system is categorized by its capabilities, intended use, and risk level.

policies.name: rmf_measure_fairness_bias
policies.description: The AI system is measured for fairness, with harmful bias identified and managed.

policies.name: rmf_measure_ongoing_tracking
policies.description: Mechanisms are in place to track identified AI risks and system performance over time.

policies.name: rmf_measure_security_privacy
policies.description: The AI system is measured for the secure-&-resilient and privacy-enhanced characteristics.

policies.name: rmf_measure_transparency_explainability
policies.description: The AI system is measured for the accountable-&-transparent and explainable-&-interpretable characteristics.

policies.name: rmf_measure_validity_safety
policies.description: The AI system is measured for the validity & reliability and safety trustworthiness characteristics before deployment.
